title: CIVIC ENGAGEMENT AND ADVOCACY - 211info
text: UNITE OREGON CIVIC ENGAGEMENT AND ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Protects and expands the rights of immigrant, refugee, and underserved communities by offering community organizing, policy advocacy, community education, and leadership development. Promotes systemic changes in many issues including affordable housing, fair wages, racial justice, etc. by empowering communities and grassroots organizing. Does not provide direct advocacy for individuals. 1390 SE 122nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Immigrant and refugee community members and non-immigrant community members Hours: Varies Email (503) 287-4117 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 287-4117 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English and Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Ethnic Advocacy Groups Housing Advocacy Groups Human Relations Groups Immigrant Rights Groups Leadership Development * Immigrants If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITE OREGON
